allow: PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_LogicalDisk | Where-Object { $_.DriveType -eq 3 } | Select-Object DeviceID, @{N='TotalGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Size/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.FreeSpace/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='UsedGB';E={[math]::Round\(\($_.Size-$_.FreeSpace\)/1GB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
